attacking_style: Launches late, tactical attacks with positional awareness (right-hand side positioning to maximize survival chances). Timing focused on forcing disorganized chases rather than pure power.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team pattern. Appears to operate independently in breakaway scenarios based on available observations.
terrain_preference: Demonstrates breakaway craft on varied terrain. Vulnerable on narrow technical approaches where positioning errors lead to crashes.
vulnerability: Positioning errors under pressure in technical finales with narrow roads. Lost composure when peloton compressed on narrow approach (2018 Tour crash).
key_patterns: Uses late attacks with tactical positioning to survive rather than win outright (2 instances)
Positioning errors on technical narrow sections under high-speed peloton pressure (crash 2018)
Prioritizes breakaway survival over stage victory; accepts secondary results with smart timing
form_trajectory: unknown: 4-year gap between observations makes trajectory assessment unreliable, but 2022 shows tactical maturity
